title: Claim Status
description: Orthogonal 6-dimension epistemic status model. Each dimension is independent.

contestation.description: Whether the claim has been formally contested.

evidence.description: Strength of supporting evidence. 'corroborated' requires ≥2 independent primary/secondary sources.

consensus.description: 'consensus' requires ≥3 independent sources + editorial acceptance + no unresolved material challenge.

temporal.description: 'superseded' = historically recorded but no longer preferred. 'retracted' = affirmatively invalid.
